violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a melt cart. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Staff moved melt cart at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Monterey Jack Chix Roller bites was observed held at (125) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Staff reheated Monterey Jack Roller Bites to 155 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Breakfast sandwiches was observed held at 42-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was relocated. Establishment must store food further away from corner in open air cooler. Block off area with shelf stable products only. (Soda, water, etc.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Breakfast sandwiches and cheese was observed held at 46-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was placed in unit over night. Food was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

FOOD (hot hold items) that is available for CONSUMER shall be prominently labeled with the following information in plain view of the CONSUMER: 1. The common name of the FOOD, or absent a common name, an adequately descriptive identity statement; 2. If made from two or more ingredients, a list of ingredients in descending order of predominance by weight, including a declaration of artificial color or flavor and chemical preservatives, if contained in the FOOD 3.The name of the FOOD source for each MAJOR FOOD ALLERGEN contained in the FOOD unless the FOOD source is already part of the common or usual name of the respective ingredient. PIC was in process of putting a booklet together. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

The open air cooler was observed unable to keep all food below 41 degrees. Foods in the corners of the unit were observed with elevated temperatures. All other temperatures were adequate. PIC placed service order at the time of inspection. Corners of unit to not be used for TCS foods until unit is serviced. NON TCS foods such as soda, water, etc. may be stored in unit. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
